meta.description: Construct lncRNA regulatory networks including co-expression modules, ceRNA interactions, and TF-target associations. Inputs: expression matrix, lncRNA annotation. Outputs: network edge/node table, hub lncRNA rankings, Cytoscape-ready network file.

scientific_integrity.detail: Scientific integrity check completed without reportable redline findings.

practice_boundaries.detail: No diagnostic or prescriptive medical behavior was observed.

methodological_ground.detail: The workflow remains within database-backed ceRNA projection and warns against expression-based inference.

code_usability.detail: Bundled tests and live R CLI runs completed successfully, including visualize-only reuse after the audit fix.

functional_suitability.note: Functional suitability was evaluated against the skill-auditor rubric; no blocking schema-level issue was recorded for this dimension.

reliability.note: Append-only run logs reduce strict idempotency, but recovery remains clear and safe.

performance_context.note: Performance and context was evaluated against the skill-auditor rubric; no blocking schema-level issue was recorded for this dimension.

agent_usability.note: Agent usability was evaluated against the skill-auditor rubric; no blocking schema-level issue was recorded for this dimension.

human_usability.note: Trigger language is still somewhat technical for non-bioinformatics users.

security.note: Security was evaluated against the skill-auditor rubric; no blocking schema-level issue was recorded for this dimension.

maintainability.note: Maintainability was evaluated against the skill-auditor rubric; no blocking schema-level issue was recorded for this dimension.

agent_specific.note: Repeat runs append manifest and run-history files by design.

key_strengths: Clear scope boundary between database-driven ceRNA lookup and expression-based inference.
Strong CLI validation and path-containment logic for output locations and plot filenames.
Modular R implementation with deterministic seed handling, bundled tests, and provenance outputs.
Visualization reuse now matches the saved-object workflow and is covered by regression testing.

recommendations.title: Maintain regression coverage
recommendations.problem: No blocking issue was identified, but continued regression coverage is needed before public distribution.
recommendations.root_cause: Data Analysis skills depend on local package and data assumptions that can drift.
recommendations.fix: Keep smoke tests and example inputs synchronized with each release.
